parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  p_lead_email: $json.lead_email,
  p_full_name: $json.full_name || null,
  p_company: $json.company || null,
  p_linkedin_urn: $json.linkedin_urn || null,
  p_phone_e164: $json.phone_e164 || null,
  p_channel: $json.channel,
  p_new_intent: $json.intent,
  p_aimfox_campaign: $json.aimfox_campaign || null,
  p_email_sender_inbox: $json.email_sender_inbox || null
}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  p_event_id: $json.event_id,
  p_lead_email: $json.lead_email,
  p_timestamp: $json.timestamp,
  p_channel: $json.channel,
  p_direction: $json.direction,
  p_content: $json.content,
  p_content_type: $json.content_type,
  p_sender_name: $json.sender_name,
  p_intent: $json.intent,
  p_metadata: $json.metadata,
  p_workflow_execution_id: $json.workflow_execution_id
}) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', event_id: $('Check Insert Result').first().json.event_id, lead_email: $('Check Insert Result').first().json.lead_email, overall_intent: $('Upsert Lead').item.json.overall_intent }) }}
